**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Junzheng Technology Co., Ltd. is a classic specimen of a zero-employee shell company where an 'encyclopedic license was misjudged as hardcore manufacturing.' The forensic engine has completely cleared the underlying false industry data triggered by the Apple Inc. consumer electronics empire. The official system was blinded by the extremely intimidating terms like 'production of electronic products, power equipment, and communication equipment' in its license, mechanically categorizing it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe directly uncovered its old and hollow baseline: this twenty-year-old shell established in 2004 has a paid-in capital of a mere 1.02 million, and most fatally, its 2024 insured headcount is an absolute '0 people.' Its registered address is 'No. 9 Wangjinshi, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City,' which is an old-style mixed commercial/residential street in downtown Nanjing (edge of Zhujiang Road/Xinjiekou). In a downtown street storefront or an old office building, relying on 0 employees to 'produce' power equipment and communication equipment? This is a complete fantasy. Reviewing its highly exaggerated business license: ranging from producing electronic appliances to monopolizing the construction of almost all engineering projects including electrical, environmental, communication, and network, and finally even selling 'daily general merchandise' and 'building materials.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a heavy electronic manufacturing plant, but a 'pure Zero-Employee Universal Engineering & Trading Shell (operating out of downtown for qualification affiliation and reselling).' The boss (Li Zhu) retains this old shell purely to take on outsourced engineering projects everywhere, act as a middleman for equipment procurement, or use it for routing funds and issuing invoices.
